PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+checkout\s+-b\s+"; then BRANCH=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=checkout\s-b\s)\S+"); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && ! echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qP "^(feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf|build|revert)/[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]+$"; then echo "WARNING: Branch name '$BRANCH' does not follow convention: type/short-description" >&2; echo "Expected prefixes: feat/, fix/, chore/, docs/, refactor/, test/, ci/" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse.windows: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+checkout\s+-b\s+"; then BRANCH=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=checkout\s-b\s)\S+"); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && ! echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qP "^(feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf|build|revert)/[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]+$"; then echo "WARNING: Branch name '$BRANCH' does not follow convention: type/short-description" >&2; echo "Expected prefixes: feat/, fix/, chore/, docs/, refactor/, test/, ci/" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
